result:
**Goal: Add a Strange Attractor visualization mode.**

This would render classic chaotic dynamical systems (Lorenz, Rössler, Chua, Thomas, Aizawa, Halvorsen) by projecting their 3D trajectories onto the terminal grid as density heatmaps. It's a natural fit — the project has 47 grid/particle simulation modes but nothing yet that visualizes continuous-time chaotic ODEs. The result would be iconic butterfly and spiral patterns building up in real-time, with interactive rotation and parameter tuning.

Want me to build it?
